data.description: When casting a spell that you know at a higher level, you can instead cast it as the spell is described in its lower level. If you do so, you use a slot two levels higher than the spell’s actual level.
A malevolent spell that curses a target and deals psychic damage at the start of its turns.
An action is a character's activity in their turn.

You radiate holy energy in a 20-foot radius. For the duration, friendly creatures within that aura have resistance to necrotic and poison damage, and nonhostile creatures can't willingly enter or start their turn in the aura without provoking an opportunity attack from you.

You can concentrate on a spell as a bonus action on each of your turns if the spell requires concentration. While concentrating on more than one spell, you lose concentration on a spell that ends, or when it deals damage to you, has an interruption effect such as being incapacitated, or is dispelled. You can end concentration early by taking the Concentrate action on your turn.A spell requires concentration if it lasts longer than one action.

Creatures of your choice that are within 10 feet of you when cast have advantage on saving throws against being hit. Other creatures on saving throws against attacks gain disadvantage until the spell ends. Additionally, when a fiend or undead creature hits an affected creature with a melee attack, it must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or be blinded until the spell ends.

1action

Range: feet
150
Components: M(a octopus
Duration:

V,S. pickled tentacle)
Concentration, up to 1 minute
Target creature takes a -2 penalty to AC, and you can deal extra damage to it.
1 action Time: bonus Range: feet 90 Components: V Duration:
up 1hour

You choose a creature that you can see within range and mystically mark it as your quarry. Until the spell ends, you know the general location of the target if you have seen it before. When you hit the target with a weapon attack, you deal an extra 1d6 radiant damage to it. You also gain advantage on Wisdom (Perception) or Wisdom (Survival) checks you make to find it. If the target drops to 0 hit points, the spell ends. As a bonus action on each of your turns, you can reaffix the mark to a creature you can see.
on spell up to hours.
